title: Bin Bags Black | Extra Heavy Duty Refuse Sacks | 200 Gauge Trash Bags | 50 Micron | ZIRCON | 200/Box
features: Built for Heavy Loads: Designed for commercial strength, these bin bags hold up to 20kg when not overloaded. Ideal for tough waste, they reduce the risk of rips or spills during disposal.

Premium-Quality Material: Crafted from 200-gauge (40 micron) thick plastic, these extra–heavy-duty garbage bags offer superior durability. The solid black color keeps contents discreet and bins looking clean.
Ideal Bin Compatibility: Sized at 18 x 29 x 39 inches, these liners fit snugly into 80 - 90 litre bins. Suitable for restaurants, garages, offices, and other high-traffic environments.

Odour-Free & Hygienic: No more bad smells - these tear-resistant trash bags are unscented, keeping waste securely contained. A cleaner, fresher space for employees and customers without the hassle of leaks.

Industry-Leading Experts: Trusted family-run brand offering high-performance polythene products made from clean post-industrial waste blended with virgin polymer. It delivers reliable, custom solutions at unbeatable prices with expert support for every need.
description: From the manufacturer Extra Heavy Duty Black Bin Bags The bin bags are made in good-grade plastic. The bags come in various capacities which can be used to differentiate the different types of waste and can be discarded accordingly. The bin bags have a seal at the top to avoid any leaks, spillage, and escaping odour. The bags are designed to contain waste without much odour and foul smells. Quality Just Bin Bags has a large variety of extra heavy-duty, heavy-duty, medium-duty, light-duty bin bags & wheelie bin liners. Suitable for the kitchen, home, garden, office and other spaces. Our bags are made with high-quality plastic that is durable and comes in various sizes. The rubbish bin bag has a capacity of 80l and can hold up to 20kg of waste. The bags are ideal for all indoor spaces. Our bin bags are: Durable and extra heavy-duty bin bag Designed for indoor dustbins No spillage, No odour, No leaks Recycled Plastic Our quality bin bags are made from recycled plastic. The bags are sustainable. The plastic meets the minimum gauge protocols and is thick.
